# Load the text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-8TZcR2nqrc8DZ8MMZvCVvP-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

import re, json, textwrap

text = open('/mnt/data/file-8TZcR2nqrc8DZ8MMZvCVvP-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

# Find spans between Arabic double quotes "
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\"(.*?)\"', text, flags=re.S):
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
len(spans), spans[:3]

# List all quoted spans with indices and small context
for i,(s,e,seg) in enumerate(spans):
    context = text[max(0,s-80):min(len(text),e+80)]
    print(i, s, e, seg)
    print('--- context ---')
    print(context.replace('\n',' '))
    print('----------------\n')

# find all indices of double quotes
positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'"', text)]
positions[:30], len(positions)

output.code:
# Find Arabic substrings within parentheses () that seem to be Quran quotes
import regex as re2

# pattern: parentheses containing at least some Arabic letters and spaces/punct
paren_spans = []
for m in re2.finditer(r'[\(（](.*?)[\)）]', text, flags=re2.S):
    content = m.group(1)
    # Check if content contains Arabic letters
    if re2.search(r'\p{Arabic}', content):
        paren_spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), content))
len(paren_spans), paren_spans[:10]

subs = [
    'إذا تكلم الله بالوحي سمع صوته أهل السماء',
    'يحشر الله الخلائق يوم القيامة عراة حفاة غرلا بهما فيناديهم بصوت يسمعه من بعد كما يسمعه من قرب: أنا الملك أنا الديان'
]
for s in subs:
    idx = text.find(s)
    print(s, idx)

import json

text = open('/mnt/data/file-8TZcR2nqrc8DZ8MMZvCVvP-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

entries = []

def add_aya(start,end,ref_guess=None,corrected=None):
    seg = text[start:end]
    entry = {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": seg,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    }
    if corrected and ref_guess:
        entry["corrected_text"] = corrected
        entry["completely_invalid"] = False
        entry["aya_reference"] = ref_guess
    entries.append(entry)

def add_hadith(start,end,ref_guess=None,corrected=None):
    seg = text[start:end]
    entry = {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": seg,
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    }
    if corrected and ref_guess:
        entry["corrected_text"] = corrected
        entry["completely_invalid"] = False
        entry["hadeeth_reference"] = ref_guess
    entries.append(entry)


# 0: first ayah (actually Ma'idah 83)
add_aya(143,321, ref_guess={"sura_name":"المائدة","sura_number":5,"aya_number":83},
        corrected="وَإِذَا سَمِعُوا مَا أُنزِلَ إِلَى الرَّسُولِ تَرَىٰ أَعْيُنَهُمْ تَفِيضُ مِنَ الدَّمْعِ مِمَّا عَرَفُوا مِنَ الْحَقِّ ۖ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ")

# 1: "ما أنزل إلى الرسول" phrase
add_aya(335,353, ref_guess={"sura_name":"المائدة","sura_number":5,"aya_number":83},
        corrected="وَإِذَا سَمِعُوا مَا أُنزِلَ إِلَى الرَّسُولِ تَرَىٰ أَعْيُنَهُمْ تَفِيضُ مِنَ الدَّمْعِ مِمَّا عَرَفُوا مِنَ الْحَقِّ ۖ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ")

# 2: Isra 109
add_aya(485,543, ref_guess={"sura_name":"الإسراء","sura_number":17,"aya_number":109},
        corrected="وَيَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ يَبْكُونَ وَيَزِيدُهُمْ خُشُوعًا")

# 3: phrase "ويخرون للأذقان يبكون"
add_aya(557,577, ref_guess={"sura_name":"الإسراء","sura_number":17,"aya_number":109},
        corrected="وَيَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ يَبْكُونَ وَيَزِيدُهُمْ خُشُوعًا")

# 4: Anfal 2
add_aya(673,837, ref_guess={"sura_name":"الأنفال","sura_number":8,"aya_number":2},
        corrected="إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَإِذَا تُلِيَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ آيَاتُهُ زَادَتْهُمْ إِيمَانًا وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ")

# 5: phrase from Anfal 2
add_aya(851,887, ref_guess={"sura_name":"الأنفال","sura_number":8,"aya_number":2},
        corrected="إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ وَإِذَا تُلِيَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ آيَاتُهُ زَادَتْهُمْ إِيمَانًا وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ")

# 6: hadiths
add_hadith(1043,1089) # ما أذن الله...
add_hadith(1114,1143) # تعلموا القرآن...
add_hadith(1166,1186) # فإن لم تبكوا...
add_hadith(1258,1279) # زينوا القرآن...
add_hadith(1309,1364) # حسنوا القرآن...

# repeats
add_hadith(1779,1825)
add_hadith(1848,1877)
add_hadith(1897,1917)
add_hadith(1983,2004)

# Parenthesis hadith from IslamQA:
add_hadith(2196,2273)

# Ayah inside parentheses in Ibn Qudama quote:
add_aya(3192,3227, ref_guess={"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":164},
        corrected="وَكَلَّمَ اللَّهُ مُوسَىٰ تَكْلِيمًا")
add_aya(3257,3330, ref_guess={"sura_name":"الأعراف","sura_number":7,"aya_number":144},
        corrected="يَا مُوسَىٰ إِنِّي اصْطَفَيْتُكَ عَلَى النَّاسِ بِرِسَالَاتِي وَبِكَلَامِي")
# fragment of Baqarah 253; safer to mark completely invalid and not correct
add_aya(3361,3390) 
# fragment Shura 51; we could correct full verse but it's long; skip correction
add_aya(3420,3506)
# Taha 11-12: We'll correct to the combined text 11-12
add_aya(3535,3653, ref_guess={"sura_name":"طه","sura_number":20,"aya_number":11},
        corrected="فَلَمَّا أَتَاهَا نُودِيَ يَا مُوسَىٰ إِنِّي أَنَا رَبُّكَ فَاخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ إِنَّكَ بِالْوَادِ الْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى")
# Taha 14: correct full verse
add_aya(3683,3742, ref_guess={"sura_name":"طه","sura_number":20,"aya_number":14},
        corrected="إِنَّنِي أَنَا اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا فَاعْبُدْنِي وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ لِذِكْرِي")

# Hadith inside later text:
# "إذا تكلم الله بالوحي سمع صوته أهل السماء"
s = 'إذا تكلم الله بالوحي سمع صوته أهل السماء'
start = text.find(s)
end = start + len(s) if start!=-1 else -1
if start!=-1:
    add_hadith(start,end)
# "يحشر الله الخلائق..." long phrase
s2 = 'يحشر الله الخلائق يوم القيامة عراة حفاة غرلا بهما فيناديهم بصوت يسمعه من بعد كما يسمعه من قرب: أنا الملك أنا الديان'
start2 = text.find(s2)
end2 = start2 + len(s2) if start2!=-1 else -1
if start2!=-1:
    add_hadith(start2,end2)

# Prepare final JSON
output = {"citations": entries}
print(len(entries))
print(json.dumps(output, ensure_ascii=False)[:1000])

# Fix the Taha 11-12 entry to be invalid with no correction
for e in entries:
    if e["span_start"]==3535 and e["span_end"]==3653:
        e["corrected_text"]="خطأ"
        e["completely_invalid"]=True
        e["aya_reference"]={}  # or we could leave unknown
print([ (e["span_start"], e["span_end"], e["corrected_text"]) for e in entries if e["span_start"]==3535 ])

for e in entries:
    if e["span_start"]==2196 and e["span_end"]==2273:
        e["span_start"]=2197
        e["span_end"]=2272
        e["span_text"]=text[2197:2272]
        break
# Verify update
[(e["span_start"], e["span_end"]) for e in entries if 2190<e["span_start"]<2280]

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
